ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "incomesq" REAL /* Square of the annual income (for analysis purposes) */,
  "ownrent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer owns (1) or rents (0) their home */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spending" (
  "spending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spending record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "avg_expense" REAL /* Average monthly expense */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the expense data */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the expense data */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the spending data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the spending record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the spending record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spending_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the customer */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Size of the customer's household */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial product (e.g., loan, savings, investment) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the product */,
  "minimum_income" REAL /* Minimum annual income required to qualify for the product */,
  "maximum_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of the customer to qualify for the product */,
  "minimum_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age of the customer to qualify for the product */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for loan products */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount for loan products */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the product in months or years */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_products" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial product */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer subscribed to the product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment for the product */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment for the product */,
  "total_amount_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid by the customer for the product */,
  "outstanding_balance" REAL /* Outstanding balance for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subscription record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subscription record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES financial_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
